revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

An alternating sector is a sector with alternating flashing colours of fixed flash length throughout the sector.

[[Image:AlternatingSectors.jpg|none|frame|right|400px|figure 1]]


Source: ENG4, Guideline 1041
